__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Ruby Laser,Nishijin Fabric,Giant Book,Fleming's Diode
|rank=purple
|amount=4
|category=self
|description=Per 20 Research Manuals used, Snail ATK +16; Research Manuals Used: 400/400
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Research Manuals]]
